rawRustPressure.policy: No raw Rust escapes are used in app/test Haxe source for the current pressure-test surface.

gaps.reproduction: External codex-hxrust portable/metal profile builds generated CallStack Rust that referenced an unresolved root Exception type when the dev haxelib checkout did not expose haxe.rust std top-level entries.
gaps.workaround: Historical local CallStack.cross.hx Dynamic workaround; now removed and recorded as resolved-upstream.

gaps.reproduction: Protocol-ID hxml printed generated Cargo errors while the parent haxe process exited successfully, so harnesses needed defensive Cargo checks.
gaps.workaround: Keep generated Cargo gates in codex-hxrust even after the compiler fix; the upstream fix now propagates Cargo failure as a Haxe compiler error.

gaps.reproduction: Protocol ID validation exposed Null<Int> stringification/comparison and String.charCodeAt Option comparison lowering errors.
gaps.workaround: Generic nullable_scalar_charcode snapshot now covers the Haxe patterns; keep local DTO code straightforward and avoid raw Rust.

gaps.reproduction: Typed parse-result enums such as IdParseResult<T> generated Rust with unbound generic parameters.
gaps.workaround: Resolved by generic enum type-parameter lowering; codex-hxrust can use generic result enums where useful.

gaps.reproduction: JSON boundary helpers exposed Rust move errors when a parsed haxe.json.Value enum was passed to multiple helper calls.
gaps.workaround: Compiler now treats Haxe enum values as reusable cloneable values for typed by-value helper calls.

gaps.reproduction: Mock model stream parsing exposed a non-Void helper with top-level try/catch return branches lowering to a Rust match statement with a trailing semicolon.
gaps.workaround: The local parseJson shape workaround was removed after the generic try_catch_tail_nonvoid fix landed.

gaps.reproduction: One-turn state-machine work exposed non-null interface/trait-object comparisons against null lowering to invalid generic pointer equality.
gaps.workaround: Compiler now evaluates non-null interface/null-literal comparisons to the correct constant result.

gaps.reproduction: Passing a literal null to an interface-typed parameter needed a generic nullable trait-object representation/lowering decision.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: Null<Interface> and Null<polymorphic-base> lower to nullable HxDynRef<dyn Trait> handles; codex-hxrust can remove this as a compiler-gap workaround when the consuming ModelClient boundary needs nullable injection.

gaps.reproduction: Caf receipt/bridge path handling needed directory extraction, but haxe.io.Path.directory lowering was not reliable enough for the adapter slice.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: haxe.io.Path.directory lowers through hxrt::path::directory with Haxe-compatible separator semantics; adapter code can use native Path.directory when the local helper is retired.

gaps.reproduction: Caf receipt/bridge filename handling needed last separator lookup, but String.lastIndexOf lowering was not reliable enough for the adapter slice.
gaps.workaround: Resolved upstream: String.lastIndexOf lowers through hxrt::string::last_index_of with optional start-index semantics; adapter code can use native String.lastIndexOf when the local helper is retired.
